What We Do

Our Services

From emergency callouts to full system installations, we cover all aspects of domestic plumbing, heating, and bathroom fitting across Belper and the wider Derbyshire area.

Boiler Installations

Supply and installation of new boilers from leading manufacturers. Full system checks, commissioning, and warranty registration included.

Boiler Servicing & Repairs

Annual servicing to keep your boiler running safely and efficiently. Fast diagnosis and repair of faults to get your heating back up and running.

Central Heating Systems

Full central heating installations and upgrades including radiator installations, pipework, thermostats, and smart heating controls.

Bathroom Fitting

Complete bathroom installations from design to finish. Suites, wet rooms, shower enclosures, tiling, and all associated plumbing works.

Plumbing Repairs

Leaks, burst pipes, dripping taps, blocked drains — all domestic plumbing repairs handled quickly and professionally.

Renewables & Heat Pumps

Air source and ground source heat pump installations. Future-proof your home with low-carbon heating solutions and reduce energy bills.

Why Choose OMP

Honest Work.
Fair Prices.

OMP Plumbing & Heating Services is a local, owner-operated business based in Belper, Derbyshire. Every job is carried out to the highest standard with no subcontractors — you always deal directly with the engineer.

01

Direct Engineer Contact

No call centres or middlemen. You speak directly to the tradesperson doing the work.

02

Transparent Pricing

Free, no-obligation quotes with no hidden costs. What we quote is what you pay.

Locally Trusted

Serving Belper and surrounding Derbyshire communities with a strong reputation for quality.
